description: Comprehensive monitoring dashboard for AWS Managed Streaming for Apache Kafka (MSK) clusters. Covers broker metrics, topic throughput, partition health, consumer lag, and AWS CloudWatch instance metrics.
title: AWS MSK Cluster

var-deployment-environment.name: deployment.environment
var-deployment-environment.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'deployment.environment')) as `deployment.environment`
FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
WHERE (metric_name LIKE '%kafka%' OR metric_name LIKE '%jvm%')
  AND (unix_milli >= (toUnixTimestamp(now() - toIntervalDay(1)) * 1000))
GROUP BY `deployment.environment`

var-broker-id.name: broker_id
var-broker-id.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'broker_id')) as `broker_id`
FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name LIKE '%kafka%'
  AND (unix_milli >= (toUnixTimestamp(now() - toIntervalDay(1)) * 1000))
GROUP BY `broker_id`

var-topic.name: topic
var-topic.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'topic')) as `topic`
FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name LIKE '%kafka%'
  AND (unix_milli >= (toUnixTimestamp(now() - toIntervalDay(1)) * 1000))
GROUP BY `topic`

widgets.description: CPU utilization percentage for each MSK broker, collected via JVM process CPU metrics from OTEL JMX receiver.
widgets.title: Broker CPU Usage (%)

widgets.description: JVM heap memory used by each MSK broker process.
widgets.title: Broker Memory Usage (Heap)

widgets.description: Network bytes received per second by each MSK broker (kafka.server.BrokerTopicMetrics.BytesInPerSec via JMX receiver).
widgets.title: Network Traffic In (bytes/s)

widgets.description: Network bytes sent per second by each MSK broker (kafka.server.BrokerTopicMetrics.BytesOutPerSec via JMX receiver).
widgets.title: Network Traffic Out (bytes/s)

widgets.description: Disk space used by Kafka log data on each broker (kafka.log.log.size via JMX receiver).
widgets.title: Broker Disk Usage

widgets.description: Combined read and write disk throughput (bytes/s) per broker.
widgets.title: Broker Disk Throughput (bytes/s)

widgets.description: Number of messages produced to each Kafka topic per second.
widgets.title: Messages In Per Second

widgets.description: Number of messages consumed from each Kafka topic per second.
widgets.title: Messages Out Per Second

widgets.description: Volume of data (bytes) produced to each Kafka topic per second.
widgets.title: Bytes In Per Second

widgets.description: Volume of data (bytes) consumed from each Kafka topic per second.
widgets.title: Bytes Out Per Second

widgets.description: Number of under-replicated partitions. Non-zero values indicate replication lag or broker issues.
widgets.title: Under-Replicated Partitions

widgets.description: Count of in-sync replicas per partition. Lower values may indicate degraded replication health.
widgets.title: Partition ISR Shrinks/s

widgets.description: Total number of partitions managed by each broker.
widgets.title: Partition Count

widgets.description: Consumer group lag — number of messages behind the latest offset. High lag indicates consumers are falling behind producers.
widgets.title: Consumer Lag

widgets.description: Error rate for consumer fetch requests (failed fetches per second). Elevated rates indicate connectivity or broker issues.
widgets.title: Consumer Error Rate (Fetch Errors/s)

widgets.description: CPU credit usage for MSK brokers running on burstable EC2 instances (T-family). Collected via AWS CloudWatch receiver for OTEL Collector. Metric: aws.msk.broker.cpu_credit_usage.
widgets.title: CPU Credit Usage (CloudWatch)

widgets.description: Remaining CPU burst balance for MSK brokers on burstable instances. When this reaches 0 the broker throttles to baseline CPU. Metric: aws.msk.broker.cpu_credit_balance.
widgets.title: Burst Balance (CloudWatch)

widgets.description: Network I/O for MSK brokers as tracked by AWS CloudWatch. Shows both bytes in (NetworkRxDropped/NetworkRxErrors) and out at the EC2 instance level. Metrics: aws.msk.broker.network_rx_bytes and aws.msk.broker.network_tx_bytes.
widgets.title: Network I/O (CloudWatch)
